prestazioni: Engine: N63B44O2 (6.6L V12 twin-turbo) – Full billet aluminum crankshaft upgrade by Manley Performance (forged 4340 steel, 92.8mm stroke, 10.5:1 compression) with ACL Race Series main and rod bearings, paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (640g weight, 150,000 psi tensile strength) to handle 850+ WHP on E85 fuel.

Turbocharger System: Twin Precision Turbo PT6766CE (67mm, 66mm compressor wheel) with custom Inconel 718 turbine housings (divorced wastegate setup) and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegates, mated to a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Armytrix (equal-length, 1.75-inch primary tubes) with ceramic coating by Swain Tech.

Fuel & Ignition: Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps (1,200 LPH each), Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2,000cc/min), and a custom 12-layer fuel rail by Radium Engineering. Ignition system features MSD 8522 coils with NGK R7437-11 iridium spark plugs (0.020" gap) and a custom crank-trigger wheel for 1° ignition timing resolution.
estetica: Bodywork: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Novitec Rolls-Royce Division, featuring a custom 3-piece front splitter with integrated canards (autoclave-cured pre-preg carbon), extended rear fenders (50mm wider per side), and a bespoke rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cabin controls).

Wheels & Suspension: Forged 22x10.5" (front) and 22x12.5" (rear) HRE FF16 wheels (custom 5x130mm PCD, 3-piece construction) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R22 front, 325/25 R22 rear). Suspension features a full KW Automotive Clubsport coilover system (3-way adjustable, 80mm of travel) with custom valving for the N63’s 2,750kg weight, paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs.

Aerodynamics & Lighting: Custom active rear wing by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 1.2m span, 30° adjustability) with integrated LED brake light (Philips Luxeon Z ES). Front grille replaced with a bespoke laser-cut titanium mesh (0.8mm thickness, 60% open area) by 1016 Industries, and full LED headlight conversion by Diode Dynamics (Cree XHP70.2 emitters, 5,000-lumen output per side).
